trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: Bödvar has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Perception|XPHB}) checks that rely on smell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: In bear form, Bödvar makes two Rend attacks. In humanoid form, he makes two Greataxe attacks. In hybrid form, he can attack like a bear or a humanoid. He can replace one attack with a Bite attack.

action.name: Bite (Bear or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Humanoid, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target is cursed. If the cursed target drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it instead becomes a {@creature Werebear|XMM} under the DM's control and has 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this werebear's curse for 24 hours.

action.name: Greataxe (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft.. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Rend (Bear or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Shape-Shift
entries: Bödvar shape-shifts into a Large bear-humanoid hybrid form or a Large bear, or he returns to his true humanoid form. His game statistics, other than his size, are the same in each form. Any equipment he is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The meyana makes one Bite attack and one Greatclub attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Acid damage, or 10 ({@damage 4d4}) Acid damage if the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the meyana. If the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). Until the grapple ends, the meyana can't Bite another target.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage, or 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Acid damage if the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the meyana. If the target is Small or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 11}). Until the grapple ends, the meyana can't Bite another target.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The norn casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as its spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Strands of Fate
entries: When the norn rolls for {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}, they roll {@dice 3d20} and note down each result. When a creature the norn can see makes a {@dice D20} Test, the norn can choose to replace the number the character rolled on the dice with one of these results instead. Once a result has been used in this way, it is discarded.

trait.name: Nimble Movement
entries: The norn never provokes Opportunity Attacks.

action.name: Wilting Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Bolstering Spirit
entries: The norn chooses a creature it can see within 60 feet of itself. That creature regains 8 ({@dice 2d4 + 3}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

reaction.name: Swift Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The norn is hit by a melee attack.   Response: The attack misses and the norn moves up to its {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB}.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The puck casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Fey Evasion
entries: If the puck is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a saving throw to take only half damage, the puck instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The puck has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Plant Bond
entries: If the puck remains within 20 feet of a Huge or smaller plant for 8 hours, it can use special dust to form a bond with the plant, granting it sapience as if by the {@spell Awaken|XPHB} spell. The target gains the ability to understand Sylvan and becomes a puck version of an animated plant, such as a puck tree or puck shrub.

The puck can have only one plant {@condition Charmed|XPHB} in this way at a time. The condition ends if the puck harms the plant, and the plant can make a {@dc 10} Wisdom saving throw to end the condition if a request from the puck guarantees the plant's destruction. Plants freed from the charm leave the puck's grove, becoming inanimate again after 24 hours. Otherwise, the plant is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the puck for 30 days, after which the plant becomes the puck's willing servant.

The puck is emotionally bonded with each plant it has animated, {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, and enthralled. Provided such a plant is within 1 mile, the puck is aware when the plant takes damage and knows its location. If such a plant is destroyed, the puck has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn as it grieves.

action.name: Superior Invisibility
entries: The puck magically becomes {@condition Invisible|XPHB} until its {@status Concentration|XPHB} ends. Any equipment the puck wears or carries is {@condition Invisible|XPHB} with it.

bonus.name: Plant Manifestation
entries: The puck causes a plantlike duplicate of itself to emerge from a Plant within 120 feet that is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or enthralled by it. The puck can act through this duplicate until the end of its turn, at which point the duplicate disappears.

reaction.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the puck can see hits it with an attack.   Response: The puck halves the damage it takes from the attack.

legendary.name: Illusionary Menace
entries: Six images of the puck appear in multiple locations, each moving and speaking independently during the puck's turn. At the start and end of the puck's turn, and one time during the puck's movement, it can teleport to the location of one of these images. The images remain until the next round.

legendary.name: Hostile Nature
entries: Grasping vines and roots manifest in the lair. Strength or {@actSave dex} {@dc 10}, each creature hostile to the puck in the lair. {@actSaveFail} The target is moved up to 20 feet to another unoccupied space in the lair and gains the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

legendary.name: Poisonous Plants
entries: Inanimate plants in the lair twist and sprout thorns. The area becomes {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} to creatures hostile to the puck until the next round, and are subject to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 10} when a creature moves more than half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} in the area. {@actSaveFail} The creature gains the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveSuccess} the creature is Immune to the Poisonous Plants effect for 24 hours.

monster.name: Rime Hunger
languages: understands the languages it knew in life

trait.name: Fed Fortitude
entries: For 1 minute after the rime hunger regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, when damage reduces the rime hunger to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it can make a Constitution saving throw ({@dc 5} plus the damage taken), unless the damage is Fire, Radiant, or from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. On a successful save, the rime hunger drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft.   {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). The rime hunger can only grapple one target at a time.

action.name: Sapping Grasp
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the rime hunger.   Failure: 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Cold damage, and the rime hunger regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the Cold damage dealt.   Success: Half damage only.

trait.name: Berserker Endurance (Recharge after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: If the berserker takes 10 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hit points, it is reduced to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The berserker makes two handaxe attacks.

action.name: Handaxe
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target.   {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Aggressive
entries: The berserker moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} toward a hostile creature it can see.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The norn casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as its spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Strands of Fate
entries: When the norn rolls for Initiative, they roll {@dice 3d20} and note down each result. When a creature the norn can see makes a {@dice D20} Test, the norn can choose to replace the number the character rolled on the dice with one of these results instead. Once a result has been used in this way, it is discarded.

trait.name: Nimble Movement
entries: The norn never provokes Opportunity Attacks.

action.name: Wilting Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Bolstering Spirit
entries: The norn chooses a creature I can see within 60 feet of itself. That creature regains 8 ({@dice 2d4 + 3}) Hit Points.

reaction.name: Swift Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The norn is hit by a melee attack. {@actResponse} The attack misses and the norn moves up to its {@spell Fly|PHB} speed.
